rule_source: Karnataka Court Fees and Suits Valuation Act 1958

description: Suits for specific performance of contract

notes: Valued at the consideration mentioned in the agreement

rule_source: Section 48 Karnataka Court Fees and Suits Valuation Act 1958 read with Section 23(1) Land Acquisition Act
notes: Court fee as per Section 48 of Karnataka Court Fees Act. Valuation based on compensation claimed.
